bench.prompt: Write a short poem about the ocean and the moonlight in simple words that a child could read and enjoy as a bedtime story now please.
bench.source: MLCChat custom debug build (mlc_llm 0.20.dev162) on-device chat UI

ppl_source: results/triad_tinyllama_int4_m1.json (M1 dequant-then-fp16-matmul on the same eval window the FP16 baseline used; on-device run not implemented in custom MLCChat fork, MLC q4f16_1 shader is numerically equivalent to dequant-then-matmul within fp16 rounding)
